name: SambaNova Cloud
description: Registers SambaNova Cloud as a first-party OpenAI-compatible provider with upstream model discovery.

env.description: Fallback SambaNova API key used for discovery and inference when no api_key Plugin Setting is configured.

settings.label: SambaNova API key
settings.description: SambaNova API key used for model discovery and inference. Falls back to SAMBANOVA_API_KEY.

providers.name: SambaNova Cloud
providers.description: Refreshes SambaNova Cloud chat models from the upstream catalog and serves them through Pi's OpenAI-compatible transport.
